title: 10 best herbal teas for frozen shoulder
description: Salvia miltiorrhiza, also known as danshen, teas helps with frozen shoulder because of its anti-inflammatory properties. The roots of the plant have been traditionally used to improve circulation and reduce pain. By promoting blood flow to the affected area, Salvia miltiorrhiza tea may aid in the reduction of inflammation and scarring associated with frozen shoulder.
